'''âr-ng-th-sh''' ('''karangtheshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hobanob|hobanob]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ng-th-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hobanob|hobanob]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-ng-th-sh
|-
! Lemma
| karangtheshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
